reason: The mockup perfectly addresses the design brief for the [Auto follow-up from Jules circuit breaker] Circuit breaker slice. It provides a highly coherent, legible, and visually balanced dashboard interface showing an active slice ('API Authentication Flow'), a prominent 'Slice Verified' status card, concrete capability details (such as unit tests), real-time verification logs, and intuitive action buttons. It conforms to Gestalt principles of grouping/proximity and respects Miller's Law limit of visual groups. Contrast compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA) is excellent for all major text elements, ensuring a great user experience and no blockers.
concerns: The bottom navigation bar icon links for mobile viewports might have touch target sizes smaller than the 44x44px recommended by Fitts's Law for finger interactions.

The scrollbar element (`::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb` with `#3e4850` background color on a `#0b1326` scrollbar track) has a contrast ratio of only 1.98:1, which could make it difficult to locate for visually impaired users.

Since only one mockup viewport is generated (not a desktop/mobile pair of separate image files), comprehensive responsive behavior can only be simulated via inline Tailwind CSS/responsive classes rather than fully validated side-by-side screenshots.
